species: CHD4 expression is highly enriched in SSCs in the mouse testis
tissue: CHD4 expression is highly enriched in SSCs in the mouse testis
cell_type: Maintenance and self-renewal of the spermatogonial stem cell (SSC) population is the cornerstone of male fertility.
sample_source: primary cultures derived from Id4-eGfp mouse testes
we utilized well-established small interfering RNA (siRNA) knockdown strategies in primary cultures derived from Id4-eGfp mouse testes at P6–P8
age: Cultures were established using magnetic-activated cell sorting of the THY1+ testis cell population from adult (3 months) or P6–P8 testes.
cell_line: To identify SSC and progenitor populations, an Id4-eGfp transgenic mouse line was used
sex: Maintenance and self-renewal of the spermatogonial stem cell (SSC) population is the cornerstone of male fertility.
strain: F1 hybrids of C57BL/6J (Jackson Laboratories, stock no. 000664) and 129S1/SvlmJ (Jackson Laboratories, stock no. 112073) were used as recipients.
